pages.text: Biomancy's weapons are alive. They are grown in the $(l:3_machines/bio_forge)Bio-Forge$(), they carry a Nutrient reserve, and the strongest of them must be fed to keep their edge.
pages.title: Weapons of Flesh
The Caustic Gunblade
pages.text: A blade and a gun in one grown weapon — melee in the hand, a caustic projectile at range. It is a costly forge (around 250 Nutrients, and it arrives pre-loaded with a reserve) and it spends Nutrients as it fires. The recipe viewer shows its fire rate, accuracy and ammo.

$(bold)Ravenous Claws$() — worn claws that turn your own strikes into a flurry, a close-quarters answer built from the fangs and claws of your harvest.$(br2)$(bold)The Thorn$() — biomancy's shield, a living guard that punishes what strikes it.$(br2)All three are grown weapons: keep their Nutrient reserves topped from your $(l:3_machines/digester)Digester$().
pages.title: Claws & Shield
